name: Anaxagoras
description:
'On the spot, Anaxagoras diagnosed himself with love, the illogical kind where he fell at first sight.'

I---> IN WHICH, Anaxagoras falls for you on first sight, despite having only 15 days to live.

a/n: ANAXAGORAS 😭😭😭😭😭😭

whyyy??? he acc died??? omfg eudbejfjejjxjekrf

he deserves so much better(both in game and out game).

Like yall notice how he never let another close to his heart after his teacher died? We as trailblazer never meets him properly, he hid his alchemy notes from Hyacine, definitely hid thing from Phainon, suffered being on verge of death for 15 FUCKING DAYS???

AND THEN PROCEEDS TO SOLVE THE ENTIRED WORLD??? LIKE BRO 😭😭

If Castorice was someone hoyo spent time we get to know and is sad cuz they left, Anaxagoras is someone so admirable that i feel sad for never meeting properly.

it's like wishing you could talk to a tragic historical figure that deserved better and tell them that their work matters a lot.

AND LIKR WE NEVER GOT TO SEE ANAXA'S OTHER EYE IN LORE??? LIKE WDYM ITS STARS ITS GENUINELY SO PRETTY AND WE NEVER SAW IT? LIKR OK HOYO I CAN TELL YOY WANT CASTORICE TO SELL BUT PLD GIVE MY BOY ANAXA SOME LOVE 😭😭😭 HE LITERALLY DIED UNDERSTOOD BY NO ONE???

this is set after Anaxagoras's visit at dawncloud but before the first debate in canon timeline, if anyone needs clarification.
